initiatives.name: Lowell Mutual Aid
initiatives.description: A grassroots network coordinating mutual aid and community support initiatives in Lowell. They organize direct assistance, resource sharing, and solidarity networks while building sustainable systems of community care through neighborhood organizing and collective action.

initiatives.name: Lowell ABC
initiatives.description: A mutual aid collective organizing community support and solidarity initiatives in Lowell. They coordinate direct assistance, resource sharing, and community defense while building networks of mutual aid through local organizing and collective action.
